title: Step 0.8: Block 0 full-loop verification
description: Trigger TV alert -> webhook -> file in /signals/ -> Telegram notification fires. Doc result. NinjaTrader watcher NOT in scope (Block 1).

title: Step 0.5: Configure n8n host-side webhook
description: Build n8n workflow: TradingView webhook -> validate payload -> write JSON to /Volumes/Sensidine/Praxis.build/signals/<ts>.json. Schema: {symbol, side, qty, price, sl, tp, signal_id, ts}. Validate via n8n MCP, publish.

title: Step 0.6: n8n Telegram notification workflow
description: Telegram bot @xarq5bot. Workflow sends: signal received, file written, errors. Credentials stored in n8n UI not git. Needs chat_id from user.

title: Step 0.4: Google Sheets dashboard
description: Create 'PRAXIS Phase 3 Build Tracker' Google Sheet. Mirrors STATUS.md phase progress + DECISIONS log. Link from README.md. Lives in Drive folder that will be synced to project (per Step 0.7).

title: Step 0.7: Coworker folder connection (Drive sync)
description: Set up shared Google Drive folder synced to /Volumes/Sensidine/Praxis.build/. Use Drive desktop client. Folder houses build artifacts visible to coworker.
